name: ChkCreate_J1939RTSCTS, ChkStart_J1939RTSCTS
title: ChkCreate_J1939RTSCTS, ChkStart_J1939RTSCTS
syntax: dword ChkCreate_J1939RTSCTS(dword t1, dword t2, dword t3, dword t4, char[] callback1);
description: Observes the RTS/CTS transport protocol. It is possible to observe all RTS/CTS transmissions or only the transmission of a specific send node.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
